allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} videos'\); [print\(v['type'], v.get\('videoUrl',''\)[:50]\) for v in d]")

Bash(ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection="Host=localhost;Port=5434;Database=vidport;Username=admin;Password=password" dotnet ef database update --project src/VidPort.Infrastructure --startup-project src/VidPort.API)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; jobs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{j['title']} @ {j['company']} | skills: {j['skills'][:3]}\\"\) for j in jobs[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f\\"[{i['type'].upper\(\)}] {i['title']}: {i['body'][:120]}\\"\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(f'[{i[\\"type\\"].upper\(\)}] {i[\\"title\\"]}\\n         {i[\\"body\\"][:140]}\\n'\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
